title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 8 - Securing Systems
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 8 covers securing systems through strong passwords, encryption, two-factor authentication, and cybersecurity best practices. The lecture is part of Harvard's CS50 business track and is available on edX, with accompanying community resources and instructor David J. Malan's guidance on data protection from cyber threats.
